entries.title: Agonising
entries.description: Biological targets Morale save or flee the wielder. PCs damaged must EGO save or move away from the user.

entries.title: Anti-Paradoxical
entries.description: Weapon is designed to combat extra dimensional beings. Double damage to Outsider-type creatures.

entries.title: Blasting
entries.description: The weapon can hit multiple targets in the same area. Roll to-hit once and compare to the AV score of all targets.

entries.title: Blinding
entries.description: Targets must DEX Save vs 1 round of Blindness.

entries.title: Concussive
entries.description: Targets STR save or are moved away from their location.

entries.title: Corrosive
entries.description: The weapon degrades AV. On a hit, the weapon either deals damage or reduces the target's AV score by one (attacker's choice).

entries.title: Electrical
entries.description: Double damage to Synthetic creatures, targets wearing metal armour, targets in water.

entries.title: Entangling
entries.description: Targets DEX save or become Entangled. Entangled creatures have AV 09, and attack with DIS. Must DEX Save to break free.

entries.title: Eroding
entries.description: Double damage to Mineral-type creatures, vehicles, and static structures.

entries.title: Flaming
entries.description: Ignites flammable objects. Cannot be used underwater or against submerged opponents.

entries.title: Freezing
entries.description: Targets CON save vs d4 DEX damage. At 0 DEX they are frozen solid and cannot move.

entries.title: Heavy
entries.description: Double damage, double slot weight, minimum STR +3 to use.

entries.title: Hypergeometric
entries.description: The weapon exists partially outside of Euclidean space and deals doubled damage to Hypergeometric creatures.

entries.title: Mauling
entries.description: Extra dice of damage against targets with AV 13 or lower, deals halved damage to opponents with AV 16 or higher.

entries.title: Parasitic
entries.description: The weapon is alive, and cannot be unequipped without surgery. The user must consume double rations each day. It does not need to reload.

entries.title: Piercing
entries.description: Extra dice of damage against targets with AV 16 or higher, deals halved damage to opponents of AV 13 or lower.

entries.title: Psyche-Suppressant
entries.description: Double damage to Psychic creatures. Cannot use Mystic Gifts while holding.

entries.title: Strong
entries.description: The weapon deals double base damage. If the weapon would break, it does not.

entries.title: Unstable
entries.description: If the wielder of this weapon rolls a 1 while using it, the weapon explodes, dealing 2d6 damage to the wielder.

entries.title: Vampiric
entries.description: When this weapon damages biological creatures, the wielder regains HP equal to half the damage inflicted.
